value.0: Durren Deepdelve serves as the Vaultmaster of the Deepdelve Vault in L'Obsul. A careful and methodical svirfneblin, he oversees the vault's ledgers, deposits, and stone-sealed coffers with unwavering precision. His clan has long maintained the vaults as neutral stewards, a role made necessary by the constant rivalry between the city's duergar and drow.
A copy of this item (including any crafting you do on it) is used by your Bottled Companion.
A svirfneblin clerk of the Deepdelve Vault, trained in the careful work of ledgers and sealed deposits. Like others of the Deepdelve clan, they serve as neutral stewards for L'Obsul.
A copy of this item (including any crafting you do on it) is used by your Bottled Companion.

These metal golems serve as steadfast guardians of the Deepdelve Vault, their heavy frames forged from thick plates of iron and steel. They stand unmoving until roused to defend the coffers entrusted to the Deepdelve clan.

Value.value: *This construct is as motionless as a statue.*
